content.text: Set phasers to kill-er release ⚡️💥 JS #IPFS 0.33 just marched out the door with a swagger so big you wouldn't believe. Brand new WebUI 🙀 + a heap of features &fixes make it the best release since, well, the last one. Serious tho, it well good, install it https://github.com/ipfs/js-ipfs/issues/1635
